summary: Comprehensive testing of DarkStore B2B operational architecture completed. All backend APIs (19 tests) passed with 100% success rate. All frontend features tested and working correctly across 4 tabs (Live Feed, Chaos Meter, Stock Map, Stress Test). Login flow, agent decisions, metrics, stock heatmap, and stress test functionality all verified.

details: Metrics endpoint returns all 12 required fields
Live feed returns agent decisions with proper structure
Stock heatmap returns products with status (critical/low/moderate/healthy)
Category filter working for stock heatmap
Create order endpoint working and persisting to database
Get orders endpoint returns order list
Manual agent execution working (inventory + dispatch agents)
Agent decisions logged to live feed
Start stress test creates 50+ orders successfully
Duplicate stress test prevention working (400 error)
Login screen loads with email/password inputs
Successful login redirects to Live Feed tab
testID attributes present on all interactive elements
Decision cards showing summary, reasoning, confidence, timestamp
Stress test banner shows when test is running
Stock heatmap grid displaying products in 2-column layout
Color-coded status indicators (critical=red, low=orange, moderate=yellow, healthy=green)
Status distribution: 16 critical, 15 low, 10 moderate, 9 healthy
Category filter working (All, Fresh Produce, Dairy & Eggs, Beverages, Snacks, Household, Frozen, Staples)
Product cards showing: name, current stock, max stock, stock %, demand velocity, aisle
Products sorted by urgency (lowest stock % first)
LAUNCH STRESS TEST button visible and functional
Progress bar shows during test execution
Previous stress test results persisted and displayed
All 4 tabs accessible via bottom navigation
Direct URL navigation working for all tabs
No navigation errors or broken routes

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ All interactive elements have testID attributes for robust testing
✅ React Native components used correctly (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView, FlatList)
✅ API calls use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from environment variables
✅ JWT authentication with Bearer token in AsyncStorage
✅ Proper error handling in API calls
✅ Loading states and ActivityIndicator used appropriately
✅ Auto-refresh intervals set for real-time updates (5s for feed, 4s for metrics, 8s for heatmap)
✅ Mobile-first design with proper spacing (8pt grid)
✅ Color-coded status indicators for quick visual feedback
✅ Autonomous agents running in background loop every 30 seconds
✅ LLM integration (gpt-4o-mini) for agent reasoning working
✅ Stress test creates orders asynchronously without blocking UI
✅ No console errors or React Native red screen errors
Minor: TouchableWithoutFeedback deprecation warning (use Pressable instead)
seed_data_creation: No additional seed data created. Using existing seeded data: 50 products across 7 categories, 1 manager account (manager@darkstore.ai), 119 orders, 28 agent decisions from autonomous agent loop.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Backend APIs returning correct data structures. Frontend UI rendering correctly with mobile-first design. Autonomous agents (inventory + dispatch) running in background and making decisions. Stress test functionality verified with 50-order test completing successfully. No bugs or issues found. App is production-ready.

autonomous_agents.inventory_agent: Monitors stock levels, predicts stockouts, generates B2B purchase orders when stock falls below reorder point. Uses LLM reasoning for optimal order quantities.
autonomous_agents.dispatch_agent: Batches pending orders by delivery zone, optimizes picking paths through aisles, maintains 10-minute SLA. Uses LLM reasoning for complex batching decisions.
autonomous_agents.background_loop: Agents run every 30 seconds (15s during stress test). Also simulates stock depletion and PO fulfillment.

stress_test_results.performance: 100% success rate, 81 orders processed, 37 still active, 11 agent decisions made
stress_test_results.scalability: System handles high-volume order floods without errors
